intro.email: Sign in with email + password (same as on the website). Token is stored in the system keychain.
intro.token: Paste your at_live_… API key from the web app (Settings → API Keys).
intro.signup: Create your KDPBook account. Track ads, royalties, and search-terms from the desktop app.
intro.twoFactor: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
intro.twoFactorSetup: Set up two-factor authentication to finish signing in.
intro.forgotPassword: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

fields.rememberMe: Stay signed in on this Mac
fields.agreeTerms: I agree to the KDPBook Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

actions.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.sessionExpired: Session expired, please sign in again
errors.backendUnreachableHint: Check your internet connection or try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters
errors.termsRequired: You must agree to the Terms before continuing
errors.samePassword: New password must differ from the current one

retry.title: Cannot reach the server
retry.description: We were unable to contact {{host}}. Check your internet connection or try again.

footer.createKey: Create a key at kdpbook.click → Settings → API Keys.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.verifyBanner: Check your inbox to verify {{email}}. You can keep using KDPBook in the meantime.

forgotPasswordModal.title: Forgot password
forgotPasswordModal.description: Enter the email you used to sign up. If we recognise it, we'll send a reset link.
forgotPasswordModal.successDescription: If {{email}} matches an account, a reset link is on its way.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.setupIntro: Scan this QR code in Google Authenticator, 1Password, or any TOTP app. Then enter the 6-digit code below.
twoFactor.setupFailed: Could not load 2FA setup. Try again.
twoFactor.codeHint: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app.

changePassword.sectionSubtitle: Update your account password. Other sessions on other devices will be signed out.
changePassword.otherSessionsRevoked: All other sessions signed out. You stay signed in on this Mac.
